task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Role-Based Access Control** (Level 8)

Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

# Register endpoint - create new user
when user calls POST /api/register sending user:
  validate user:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
    role is text, required
  saved_user = save user to Users
  send back saved_user with status 201

# Login endpoint - authenticate and return token
when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  found_user = look up User with this email
  guard found_user is not empty or 'Invalid credentials'
  guard found_user's password is credentials's password or 'Invalid credentials'
  token_value is 'token_' + found_user's id as text
  send back {token: token_value, user: found_user} with status 200

# Get all articles - requires auth, unauthenticated returns 401
when user calls GET /api/articles:
  requires login
  articles = get all Articles
  send back articles

# Create article - only editors and admins
when user calls POST /api/articles sending article:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or caller's role is 'editor' or 'Only admins and editors can create articles'
  validate article:
    title is text, required
  article's author_id is caller's id
  saved = save article to Articles
  send back saved with status 201

# Delete article - only admins
when user calls DELETE /api/articles/:id:
  requires login
  guard caller's role is 'admin' or 'Only admins can delete articles'
  delete from Articles with this id
  send back 'Article deleted' with status 200
